name: Mocha Pudding Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons espresso coffee powder (or regular or decaffeinated)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a rack in the center of the oven and preheat to 350 degrees F. Coat an 8-inch square baking pan with cooking spray.
2. In a large bowl, combine 2/3 cup granulated sugar, all-purpose flour, salt, 1/4 cup cocoa powder, baking powder, and cinnamon. Stir well to blend. Whisk in the oil, milk, and vanilla extract until smooth. Pour batter into prepared pan and spread evenly.
3. In a small bowl, mix remaining 2/3 cup granulated sugar with 1/4 cup cocoa powder. Sprinkle over the cake batter. Dissolve espresso coffee powder in boiling water, then pour it over the batter without stirring.
4. Bake for about 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean and the top is crisp and crackled. Let cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes before serving warm from the pan.
